} @media(min-width: 576px){ :root{ --container: 992px;--postwidth:50%;--btnpadding:20px 40px;--primarybtnpadding:20px 40px;--secondarybtnpadding:20px 40px; --btnlineheight: 1.6em; --bodyfontsize: 16px; } .single .nv-meta-list{ --avatarsize: 20px; } .nv-post-cover{ --height: 320px;--padding:60px 30px;--justify: flex-start; --textalign: left; --valign: center; } .nv-post-cover .nv-title-meta-wrap, .nv-page-title-wrap, .entry-header{ --textalign: left; } .nv-is-boxed.nv-title-meta-wrap{ --padding:60px 30px; } .nv-is-boxed.nv-comments-wrap{ --padding:30px; } .nv-is-boxed.comment-respond{ --padding:30px; } .single:not(.single-product), .page{ --c-vspace:0 0 0 0;; } body:not(.single):not(.archive):not(.blog):not(.search):not(.error404) .nv-sidebar-wrap, body.post-type-archive-course .nv-sidebar-wrap, body.post-type-archive-llms_membership .nv-sidebar-wrap{ max-width: 0%; class="menu-item menu-item-type-post_type menu-item-object-page menu-item-2486"><div class="wrap"><a href="https://strefagitar.pl/privacy-policy-2/">Privacy Policy</a></div></li><li id="menu-item-2489" class="menu-item menu-item-type-post_type menu-item-object-page menu-item-2489"><div class="wrap"><a href="https://strefagitar.pl/affiliate-disclosure/">Affiliate .wrap > a { margin-right: calc(-1em - (18px*2));}</style><main id="content" class="neve-main"><div class="container single-page-container"><div class="row"><div class="nv-single-page-wrap col"><div class="nv-content-wrap entry-content"><div id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-columns-e1ca32e1" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-columns alignfull has-1-columns has-desktop-equal-layout has-tablet-equal-layout has-mobile-equal-layout has-vertical-unset"><div class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-columns-overlay"></div><div class="innerblocks-wrap"><div id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-column-65b5ef21" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-column"><h1 id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-bb0c2df7" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-bb0c2df7">Strefa Gitar</h1><p class="has-text-align-center has-white-color has-text-color">ENG: Welcome to our blog – your new hub for everything related to guitars, amplifiers, and effects! We run a blog and two YouTube channels for international and Polish audiences.<br><br>PL: Witaj na naszym blogu! Na stronie posiadamy sekcje dla zagranicznych oraz polskich muzyków. Zapraszamy także do subskrybowania Strefy na YouTubie!</p><div class="wp-block-buttons is-horizontal is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-buttons-is-layout-1 wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex"><div class="wp-block-button is-style-primary"><a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" rel="nofollow noopener" href="https://youtube.com/@bestguitarsnow" target="_blank">YouTube (English)</a></div><div class="wp-block-button is-style-primary"><a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" rel="nofollow noopener" href="https://youtube.com/@strefagitar" target="_blank">YouTube (Polish)</a></div></div></div></div></div><section id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-columns-e7931e5c" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-columns alignfull has-1-columns has-desktop-equal-layout has-tablet-equal-layout has-mobile-collapsedRows-layout has-vertical-center"><div class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-columns-overlay"></div><div class="innerblocks-wrap"><div id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-column-311d4b3f" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-column"><h2 id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-9544202b" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-9544202b"><strong>About Us</strong></h2><p class="has-text-align-center"><br>Here, everything revolves around guitars.</p><p class="has-text-align-center">Whether you&#8217;re a beginner or have been playing for years – you&#8217;ll find useful tips, exciting tutorials, and detailed reviews of guitars, amps, and pedals.</p><p class="has-text-align-center">Discover new techniques, learn about the latest trends in the guitar world, and refine your sound.</p><p class="has-text-align-center"><strong>Everyone who loves the guitar as much as we do is welcome here 😉</strong></p><div class="wp-block-buttons is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-buttons-is-layout-2 wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex"><div class="wp-block-button is-style-primary"><a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" href="https://strefagitar.pl/blog/"><strong>Read the Latest Articles!</strong></a></div></div></div></div></section><section id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-columns-e4373a2b" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-columns alignfull has-1-columns has-desktop-equal-layout has-tablet-equal-layout has-mobile-equal-layout has-vertical-flex-start has-dark-bg"><div class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-columns-overlay"></div><div class="innerblocks-wrap"><div id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-column-0b9db5af" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-column"><section id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-columns-62d68e08" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-columns has-1-columns has-desktop-equal-layout has-tablet-equal-layout has-mobile-equal-layout has-vertical-flex-start"><div class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-columns-overlay"></div><div class="innerblocks-wrap"><div id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-column-ba020b38" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-column"><h2 id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-6d6c2f48" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-6d6c2f48"><strong>Why Learn with Us?</strong></h2></div></div></section><section id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-columns-6fc7adce" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-columns has-3-columns has-desktop-equal-layout has-tablet-equal-layout has-mobile-collapsedRows-layout has-vertical-flex-start"><div class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-columns-overlay"></div><div class="innerblocks-wrap"><div id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-column-25e97a9a" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-column"><div id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons-d5c7d449" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons"><span class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons-container"><i class="fas fa-bolt"></i></span></div><h4 id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-72a9f7c8" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-72a9f7c8"><br><strong>Improve Your Playing</strong></h4><p id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-a5f28f8f" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-a5f28f8f">Our articles and workshops are designed to take your guitar playing to the next level. From the first chords to advanced solo techniques – we provide the content you need to become better.</p></div><div id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-column-b5b3ad1c" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-column"><div id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons-71995a22" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons"><span class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons-container"><i class="fas fa-spa"></i></span></div><h4 id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-067b6e63" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-067b6e63"><br><strong>Find Your Perfect Sound</strong></h4><p id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-7b136259" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-7b136259">Every guitarist seeks their own tone. We show you how to choose the right amplifier and the perfect effects for your style. The right equipment is key to your unique sound.</p></div><div id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-column-6be03cf4" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-column"><div id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons-52fbd165" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons"><span class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-font-awesome-icons-container"><i class="fas fa-weight-hanging"></i></span></div><h4 id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-57826d4c" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-57826d4c"><br><strong>Build Your Technique</strong></h4><p id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-9962089c" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-heading-9962089c">It&#8217;s never too late to strengthen the basics. With our step-by-step guides, you&#8217;ll enhance your technique, ensuring your playing becomes more confident and fluid.</p></div></div></section></div></div></section><div id="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-columns-dcdf867f" class="wp-block-themeisle-blocks-advanced-columns alignfull has-3-columns has-desktop-oneThreeOne-layout has-tablet-oneThreeOne-layout
